title: ZXPong Leaderboards
description: Compete for the longest rally in ZXPong and compare your performance with players around the world through Apple Game Center.
summary: Every rally is another opportunity to improve your record, climb the leaderboard, and challenge yourself.

sections.heading: Compete for the Longest Rally
paragraphs: The main Apple Game Center leaderboard for ZXPong rewards players who can keep the rally going for the longest.
Long rallies require excellent positioning, quick reactions, and consistent paddle control, making every match another opportunity to improve.

sections.heading: Climb the Leaderboards
paragraphs: Focus on returning the ball consistently rather than taking unnecessary risks. Longer rallies naturally lead to stronger leaderboard performances.
Leaderboards work alongside achievements and BarkinMad Coins, rewarding regular play and giving you new goals every time you return to ZXPong.

images.caption: Compete for longer rallies and higher leaderboard positions.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Rally Counts
featureShowcases.summary: Compete for longer rallies, beat your personal best, and climb the leaderboard.
body: Every successful return brings you one step closer to a new personal best. As your timing and positioning improve, you'll naturally build longer rallies and move higher up the leaderboard.
Combined with achievements and BarkinMad Coins, the leaderboard gives you another reason to keep improving every time you play.
bullets: Works alongside achievements and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Every rally is another opportunity to climb the leaderboard.
